title: sedum telephium var. saxifragum
intro: Sedum telephium var. saxifragum, also known as the stone orpine, is a perennial succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of sedum telephium var. saxifragum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
